chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-4296 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on Misc. No.17915/2025 (Urgency) 2. For order on office objection Nos.1 to 7 3. For order on Misc. No.17916/2025 (Exemption) 4. For hearing of main case 10.9.2025 Mr. Ahmed Hussain Jokhio advocate for the petitioner -------------------------------- 1. Urgent application is allowed. 2-4. The main grievance of the petitioner is that he was removed from service verbally on around 20.6.2012. He has made a request dated 12.3.2025 for regularization of appointment in Taluka Municipal Administration, Jati, District Sujawal, which is at page 19 of the file. Be that as it may, we hereby direct the Chairman Town Committee, Jati, District Sujawal to decide the request of the petitioner within three months of the date of this order through a speaking order after giving the petitioner an opportunity of hearing. A copy of this order alongwith request of the petitioner at page 19 of the file shall be sent to the Chairman Town Committee Jati, District Sujawal / respondent No.5, for information and compliance. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms alongwith listed applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
